ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who uploaded the document */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the document belongs */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the document */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for the document */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the document */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations for the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliated institution or organization */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "query_prefix" TEXT /* Prefix for the query */,
  "topic_id" TEXT /* ID of the topic being queried */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for the search */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of query (e.g., simple, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "related_topics" TEXT /* Related topics (for suggesting alternative searches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query that generated this result */,
  "doc_id" TEXT /* ID of the document that is a result of the query */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the result was recorded */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the document to the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_results_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query being logged */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., search, click) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_logs_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned the permission */,
  "document_id" TEXT /* ID of the document accessible by the user */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can edit the document */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can view the document */,
  "can_download" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can download the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_history" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "doc_id" TEXT /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_history_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "doc_id" TEXT /* ID of the document that this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when this version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query related to the feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was recorded */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the query results (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_feedback_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation entry */,
  "doc_id" TEXT /* ID of the document being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the annotation */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the annotation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag entry */,
  "doc_id" TEXT /* ID of the document being tagged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigning the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tag was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_tags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_tags_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)
